――夜。<br>司令室で仕事をしていると突然、ノックの音が響いた。:
That night, I was working in the command room when a knock suddenly
echoed.
ダリアか。どうしたんだこんな時間に。<br>それに、その格好は――: Daria? What are you doing here at this hour? And that outfit—
な、なんだっ？ 急に抱き着いてきたりして！？: W-What? Why are you suddenly hugging me?!
お礼したくて……色々教えてもらいに来たんです……。<br>うまくできないかもだけ:
I want to repay you... so I came to learn from you... I might not be
good, but please... So, first, a kiss—
――なるほど。要は先日、俺の世話になったから<br>恩返しがしたくてここへ来た―:
I see. So, in short, because I helped you the other day, you came here
to repay that favor—is that it?
はい……最初にそう言ったつもりだったのですが……: Yes... I thought I said that from the start, but...
（言ってないだろ……やっぱり口下手だな……<br>それにあの時も、恩義を感じてい:
(She didn't say that at all... she's really tongue-tied... And back then,
she didn't seem to feel any obligation either...)
私、親方の役に立ちたいから娼館で働きます。<br>……衣装も揃えてきました。:
I want to be useful to you, Boss, so I'll work at the Brothel. I've
prepared an outfit too.
気持ちはありがたいが、そこまでしなくていいぞ。<br>大穴探索で力を貸してくれた:
I appreciate the sentiment, but you don't have to go that far. It's
enough that you help me explore the Abyss.
ダリアはふるふると首を横に振って、無言で、静かに抱き着いてくる。: Daria shook her head, trembling slightly, and silently hugged me.
（研修って……まあそれは説明されずとも分かるが……<br>もしかしてこいつ、俺の:
(Training... well, I understand that without needing an explanation...
Could it be that she has feelings for me...?)
確信は得られないが、女性に恥をかかせるものではない――。<br>そうしてダリアの:
I couldn't be certain, but I couldn't embarrass a woman. And so,
taking Daria's hand, I led her to the Brothel.
